description: Amp up your style quotient with these leather slip-ons from red tape. Stylish to the hilt and absolutely comfortable for the feet, they're a perfect addition to your wardrobe. Team them with chinos and a simple shirt for that cool, casual look.UpperTextured leather upper for that stylish look and comfort feelElasticated inserts on either side of the tongue for easy insertion and removal of the feetRugged stitch detailing for style and durabilityCushioned collar for greater comfortTextile lining for greater comfortComplete inner fabric lining for breathable comfortFabric footbed for all-day comfort and sweat protectionMidsoleRubber midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with herringbone grooves and deep flex groovesshoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineDo not store in direct sunlight
